title: Extensions
excerpt: description: R2 extensions to the S3 API, including Unicode metadata and custom headers. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. R2 implements some extensions on top of the basic S3 API. This page outlines these additional, available features. Some of the functionality described in this page requires setting a custom header. For examples on how to do so, refer to [Configure custom headers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/examples/aws/custom-header).…
